news.t: Dana Investment Advisors Launches Two New ETFs: Dana Unconstrained Equity ETF (DUNK) and Dana Concentrated Dividend ETF (DIVE)

holdings.infoBox: DUNK is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Snowflake stock at 11.27%, Datadog at 8.32%, ServiceNow at 8.26%, NVIDIA at 7.85%, and Amazon.com at 7.82%.

overview.description: The Dana Unconstrained Equity ETF (DUNK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, holding a concentrated portfolio of 15-30 US equities. The fund follows an unconstrained approach across growth and value, seeking opportunities in disruptive and undervalued companies. DUNK was launched on Sep 16, 2025 and is issued by Dana.

data.title: Dana Investment Advisors Launches Two New ETFs: Dana Unconstrained Equity ETF (DUNK) and Dana Concentrated Dividend ETF (DIVE)
data.text: WAUKESHA, Wis., Sept. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Dana Investment Advisors, Inc., a boutique asset management firm with over four decades of experience guiding investors through evolving market envir...
